S_0: user-specified chemistry tasks and reaction conditions
E_exec: documentation-guided code execution and partially manual plate handling
M: tool outputs and reusable reaction information; no stable taxonomy-native store is reported
adjudication: The source supports a task-level feedback loop, but does not report a policy that selects among fidelities, a cost function, or a budget state.

S_0: human-configured research area and experiment template
represented_S_t: research ideas and bounded computational experiment variants
G: LLM idea generation followed by prior-art filtering
E_exec: Aider edits and runs computational experiments
M: experimental-journal notes and archive of ideas/reviewer feedback
pi: result-conditioned sequential replanning for up to five experiments
adjudication: The five-experiment cap is a reported fixed limit, not an explicit dynamic resource state or cost-aware policy.

represented_S_t: template-free research tree with idea; experiment; replication; and aggregation nodes
G: LLM ideation; literature-grounded reflection; and tree-node expansion
E_exec: computational experiments; aggregation nodes only summarize prior results
M: tree history; replication results; and aggregation artifacts
pi: best-first node expansion plus LLM stage-root selection
adjudication: The source reports use of additional test-time compute but not a canonical cost function or explicit remaining-budget state; submission selection and workshop review are external.

E_exec: mle-solver generates; executes; tests; and refines ML code

pi: sequential workflow with execution reflection and PhD-agent revision decisions
adjudication: Initial problem formulation remains human-controlled; later internal revision channels establish computational closure without establishing trustworthy final acceptance.

represented_S_t: gene-function hypotheses represented in the domain model

E_exec: robotic physical experiments followed by statistical analysis
M: relational database plus updated yeast-metabolism model
pi: active closed cycle selecting experiments from the updated model
adjudication: Human provision of strains; consumables; and maintenance is recorded as participation in execution, not as absence of computational feedback.

represented_S_t: ideas; evolved ideas; implementations; and experiment variants
delta_S_operator: bounded self-evolution of ideas and adaptive implementation
G: high-temperature LLM ideation; survey-grounded generation; and self-evolution
E_exec: code execution across twelve computational tasks with iterative debugging
M: records of implementation decisions; prior results; and baseline results
pi: multi-agent ranking; bounded idea evolution; adaptive implementation; and result-conditioned replanning
adjudication: The bounded evolution count and debugging threshold are fixed limits; the source does not expose a cost-aware acquisition function or dynamic remaining-budget state.
